'''Thal K'sar''' was a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] who worked for the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]].

==Biography==
As of [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], he was an artisan, and helped design the [[Hyperwave transceiver/Legends|hyperwave transceiver]] and [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojector]] of [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray's]] [[Mechno-chair/Legends|mechno-chair]].

By the time the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] began, he had been promoted to an executive and was stationed on [[Escarte/Legends|Escarte]].

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], he was arrested and sentenced to death, supposedly for making an accounting error that would cost the Guild a fortune; in reality, [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] was attempting to cover up those who could link the captured mechno-chair to himself. However, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] were able to rescue him. K'sar told the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] about his other mechno-chair, which was placed aboard an experimental craft. The Jedi demanded information, so he told them where to find the pilot hired to fly the craft: on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naos III/Legends|Naos III]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
